description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a wide, flat body and sharply swept wings that extend outward and slightly downward, featuring bright orange tips. The main fuselage is predominantly gray with black and orange accents, and it has a cockpit canopy with a blue-tinted window situated near the front center. The wings display a purple planetary emblem on each side, adding a distinctive visual element. The rear of the airplane features a single, large jet engine integrated into the fuselage, with geometric exhaust detailing. The undercarriage and landing gear are not visible, suggesting a streamlined, possibly retractable design. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with hard, smooth surfaces and minimal external protrusions.
description: A sleek, angular gray airplane with swept orange-tipped wings, a blue-tinted cockpit, and a single rear jet engine. Purple planetary emblems decorate the wings, giving it a futuristic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular nose, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and the orange-tipped wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlights the full wingspan, the purple emblems on the wings, and the streamlined, flat body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large, single jet engine exhaust and the geometric tail section, with the cockpit canopy visible at the front.
description_view_3: Bottom/top view from the opposite side, showing the same wing and emblem details, with the engine and cockpit placement clear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and downward-angled tips; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or concealed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single blue-tinted canopy.
